body:
## Rationale

The `/history` page (Metal Drumming Evolution Timeline) is declared in `api/sitemap.js:386` at priority 0.9 but has **no case block** in `api/meta/[...path].js`. All crawlers receive the generic fallback:

```
Title: MetalForge — Metal Drummer Gear Database
Description: Explore the drum kits, cymbals, and gear used by legendary metal drummers...
```

This makes the page invisible for queries like "history of metal drums", "evolution of metal drumming", "metal drumming timeline", and "heavy metal drum kit history" — a distinct informational intent separate from drummer-gear queries.

## Impact

- Query bucket: "[era] metal drumming", "history of [technique]", "when did [X] become popular in metal"
- Serves both classic-SEO (SERP title/description match) and AI-citation (LLM context about drumming history)
- Page is already indexed but ranking signal diluted by generic title

## Fix

**File:** `api/meta/[...path].js`

Add a case block immediately before the default fallback (after line ~648):

```js
if (path === '/history') {
  return {
    title: `Metal Drum Kit History & Evolution Timeline | ${SITE_NAME}`,
    description: 'The complete history of metal drumming — from Black Sabbath in 1968 to modern extreme metal. How drum kits, techniques, and gear evolved across 50+ years.',
    image: DEFAULT_IMAGE,
    type: 'website',
    url: `${BASE_URL}/history`,
  };
}
```

No data import needed — the description is static editorial copy.

## Verify

1. `curl -A "Googlebot" https://metalforge.io/api/meta/history` → returns title containing "History" (not "Gear Database")
2. `curl -A "Googlebot" https://metalforge.io/history` → `<title>` tag reads "Metal Drum Kit History & Evolution Timeline | MetalForge"
3. Page is declared in sitemap: `curl https://metalforge.io/sitemap.xml | grep /history` → present
4. Description < 160 chars: count characters in the description string above ✓
5. No other handler conflict: grep for `'/history'` in `api/meta/[...path].js` → only this new block

## Done

- [ ] Case block added to `api/meta/[...path].js` before the default fallback
- [ ] Returns keyword-matched title and description for `/history`
title: SEO: /history page missing SSR meta — serves generic fallback
